I resisted trying Minoxinyl products because I didn't have any particular thinning pattern and was afraid of some possible adverse effects. I have been using this product for over 6 months and am pleased that my hair has thickened and stayed stronger. I have had no adverse effects and plan to continue to use this product twice a day to keep up the progress gained.

My derm suggested a minoxidil treatment to not only help regrowth but stop the other hairs from falling out. 2 weeks in I have a ton of new baby hairs and less hair is coming out when I pull my fingers through. (I was losing 30-50 hairs every time)

title: Not Great For Dyed Hair
body: Pro: I used this product for 6 months and saw hair regrowth. Con: This product contains alcohol, so if you're like me and are going gray in the same spots you need to apply this, the alcohol will remove the hair dye, and you'll need to dye your hair a lot more frequently.

title: Give it time
body: Starting using this after my dermatologist suggested I try Minoxidil 5% and that was too harsh for my scalp, so went to this 2% solution. The Dr. told me to use it for 6 months before evaluating its effectiveness. I started seeing results after about 4 months, and I think it's improving even more with time. Lots of baby hairs, and I can't see straight to my scalp in the front as easily anymore. The downside is that as a liquid, it can tend to run down onto your forehead if you don't apply carefully -- you don 't want the solution to remain on your face. But I still like it way better than the foam, which was just annoying to use. I always wash my face right after applying.

title: Worked for Me!
body: What I liked was how easy it was to apply each day. I did just like Jlo and applied it directly onto my scalp each day in the beginning. Overtime my hair came back, and now I apply every other day. I have been suffering from hair loss since having three children. It started with loss, thinning, and breaking. I was freaking out because I’ve always been known to have thick hair. I tried a few things before Minoxidil, but nothing worked. This is the only product that works and has brought my hair back to full thickness again! Yes, it takes time, but honestly, I never thought I would have more hair today then I did before I started. I noticed grow after 3-4 months, and now it’s been a year and I have thick hair. No plans to stop because it does work. But scaled back on how often I use it because I forget at times!

title: Hairy face
body: Unless you want to look like Chewbacca don’t use this on your hairline. Now I have hairy face problems. Too expensive also. The bottle and applicator makes for easy spills. If they change the bottle and application and figure out a way for this to not drain in your face and cause unwanted hair then it would be a great product to use.

title: Yay for baby hairs!!
body: After losing a lot of weight quickly from stress, my hair also started to fall out. I’ve been embarrassed and wanted to try regrowing my hair. I know minoxidil is the only product shown to improve hair growth through clinical trials and Hers is more affordable than rogaine. Along with taking biotin vitamins (not through Hers) and only applying this serum every other night, I have seen significant hair regrowth in two months. I have new (annoying) baby hairs and my ponytail is noticeably thicker. I am so happy to be getting my thicker hair back. This product won’t work overnight, but keep at it and you should see results.

title: Didn't work

title: Helped with pp hair loss
body: It really helped with my postpartum hair loss!! Didn’t think my hair would grow back

title: I was skeptical, but this worked for me!
body: I've noticed thinning hair for about 5 years now. I tried women's Rogaine for a month or so in 2018 but quickly gave up because of how it made my hair feel. This January, I noticed that the thinning had gotten really, really severe. I scoured the internet for hair loss solutions after spending a lot of time crying and in distress. I looked into purchasing expensive wigs/toppers. I made a dermatologist appointment. Despite all of this, I knew it was a long shot to regrow hair. I decided to give this one a try because the reviews were pretty good and it was affordable, but I had zero hope or expectation of anything. I've been faithfully using Hers 2% minoxidil solution for 2 months now, and I'm honestly shocked. Do I have a thick, full head of hair without showing a little bit of scalp? No, but I'm not embarrassed and anxious every day. I still have thin, fine hair, but I would estimate that I've grown back 25%-30% of the hair I've lost and I only have one remaining large patch that I feel is super visible. I know how emotional distressing female pattern baldness is, and I wouldn't say this worked for me if it didn't. If you're reading these reviews obsessively like I was a couple months ago, I hope this works for you, too!

title: Didnt see a change
body: Used for 2 months. Never saw a difference. Maybe you need to use the entire system. Also made my hair greasy. Added hair, skin and nails vitamin to my daily regimen and noticed my hair fall has almost completely stopped.

title: Bad Experience

title: Takes a minute but delivers results

After reading the pamphlet I decided to give it a couple more months and I’m so glad I did. Around the end of the 3rd bottle I noticed thicker hair. You can no longer see my scalp, except a bit at my part and my hair feels and appears much thicker. My hairstylist commented on the change and wanted to know my secret ingredient. Stick in there and use 2x daily for results!

body: So I like the product now but when I very first tried it my scalp burned so bad and had little bumps. When I looked it up, apparently it was normal so I gave it a shot again and that didn’t happen after my first application. This should really be on the label. However so far so good. Doesn’t make my hair greasy and it doesn’t smell bad.

title: Really works
body: Being in my late 30’s I was horrified my hair was getting thinner and seeing my scalp was depressing so I decided to try this product. I’ve been using these drops for about 3 months and I’ll be honest I was about to give up because I wasn’t seeing any results but you have to give you body time to grow the hair. Invest in a wet brush, wash hair with cold water and try not to think about it. I feel a lot more confident but patience and consistency is important.

title: Hair regrowth
body: I've heard alot of good things about this product so I bought some and so far so good. Easy to use.

title: Itchy!
body: First, if you want to try a product like this, there are other brands with identical formulas at lower prices, probably on this same website (just sayin...) In hindsight I've learned that almost all minoxidal solution products have exactly the same ingredients. And one of those ingredients is propylene glycol, a well-known scalp irritant. It doesn't affect everyone, but if you are sensitive to it (and who would know that?) watch out! I applied this product once, in the morning, and by the evening of the same day my partner was running his fingers through my hair and commented on the large dandruff flakes (NOT normal for me!) I then went to bed and found myself waking up in the middle of the night to scratch my itchy head. By the morning I was rubbing calendula salve directly into my scalp, followed by a double shampoo. Sweet relief! Definitely not the product for me.

title: Be regular and there will be results!

title: Worked very well for my curly hair
body: I tried hers hair growth products and the shampoo and conditioner. I found that these products made my hair feel thick and soft. I have curly hair and the conditioner worked well with my curls. I also enjoyed the products' fragrances.

title: Proven by telemedics
body: Minoxidil has been verified by many studies to reduce hair loss and promote hair growth and strengthening with repeated uses. In a randomized study from 2011, solutions of minoxidil were found to show, "improvements in target area hair count, target area hair width, and overall efficacy." I have been usu v this periodically on my scalp along with a good diet and vitamins so it may be a cumulative effect, but I have noticed less hairfall. I'm not sure about alopecia patients or someone with extreme bald spots but it doesn't hurt to try.

title: so far so good

title: Great System for Women!!!
body: I loved the applicator, so you can apply product directly to the area where it's needed. It doesn't weigh the hair down, or make it look greasey. It smells nice, clean and fresh. It's a nice system and I will definitely buy again.

title: Easy application
body: I have tried other brands out there and this I find is the best. It doesn't have a unpleasant scent and it's super easy to apply. It works really well and isn't super pricey. I am definitely a purchaser of this brand and product.

title: Made my hair oily
body: This product made my fine roots look dirty and greasy, so it was difficult to want to use it daily as suggested.

title: Caused an allergic reaction after 24 days of using it
body: After almost a month of using this the shampoo and conditioner it gave me a horrible allergic reaction on my ears neck and scalp, I ended up at the ER because they got so severely swollen itchy and painful in two days , it was unbearable, I might be just an unlucky one but if you have sensitive skin I would advise to stay away from this products and not take the risk, I really wish they would have work for me but they didn’t, I ended up spending so much more money in the hospital visit and medication. pictures where taken after applying steroid cream twice so they look a bit better than how they initially were :(

title: Not even sure it works
body: Not really sure if it works since I had to stop using it around week three. This product has alcohol in it so it caused really dry scalp. Not sure if it’s worth having more hair if it’s just going to be riddled with huge dandruff flakes. I had to stop using it since the dandruff and dry scalp got so bad it would actually sting to apply the product. Not to mention it must be used twice a day and your hair must be/remain dry for hours sooo you just have greasy looking hair that you can’t touch or really style. If you’re looking at this product I would suggest maybe instead looking for a foam version that you only have to use once a day, use it at night and buy head and shoulders to combat the dandruff effects.

title: The best solution
body: I really was impressed by this hair growth solution. I didn't know if my hair was repairable. I saw it working pretty quickly. It was easy on my skin and for the price is definitely worth it. Similar products cost way more. I am definitely a new customer. I got this round free but I plan on continuing to by as soon as I get back to work. If you have patches of thinning hair I definitely recommend this. It doesn't work overnight so you have to give it time. Once I had been using it for a while I started noticing that my thinner patches were starting to improve. That really helped my feel more confident.

title: Great
body: I have struggled with thinning hair since my early 30's. For my entire life I've had thin, fine, oily hair. I started to notice in my early 30's that my hair line was changing. I was mortified. The hair on the top of my head also seemed thinner than usual, but not super obvious to anyone but me yet. I've used other brands of minoxidil before and it works if you stay consistent! But - it is so embarrassing to buy at the store. Especially since some store have it in lock boxes now. Like, what?!?! It is a GAME CHANGER that I can add this to my shampoo and conditioner order and get it delivered to my house. No embarrassment. I use this twice a day as directed and it works! I put it on the top of my head and Target my hair line and notice baby hairs growing. The key is consistency. If you don't use consistently you will not see or keep results. It's worth it to me though. I highly recommend if you are noticing thinning on your head or hairline. It does take a couple weeks to see new growth but take my word for it - don't give up!!! The patience is worth the payoff!

title: Works wonders!
body: As a bariatric patient, thinning hair is par for the course. I cried every day. I used this product and from day one-actually SEE more growth! I'm overjoyed and have my confidence restored! AMAZING PRODUCT!Think Miracle-Gro for your hair!

title: It really works!
body: I received this product to review and I'm so impressed! After only a few days of use I noticed that the clumps of hair I was losing every time I showered began to lessen and eventually stop almost completely. After a month I literally had so many baby hairs from new growth, I am so stoked! Pregnancy took a toll and I'm so happy to have found something that helps! It also smells nice and leave my hair looking nice!

title: Alright

title: good results so far

title: Miracle worker

title: hers Minoxidil Topical Hair
body: I've always had straight thin hair and have tried many products promising to thicken my hair with no success. I tried the hers Minoxidil after receiving a free sample. I have to say I was pleasently surprised that my hairdresser noticed a difference. She has been doing my hair for about 15 years now so she knows my hair very well. For that reason, I will more than likely purchase and continue to use this product.

title: Great Product
body: Great haircare products for strengthening and thickening hair!

title: Quick and easy solution
body: I've used it till last drop and results are amazing. My hair is thicker and fuller, it really stimulates hair growth. I would recommend this product to anyone who is looking for quick and easy solution

title: Hair Hair Hair
body: Started using hers minoxidil topical hair solution thickening shampoo and conditioning and immediately noticed my hair thicker, fuller and healthier. After a few weeks, I noticed new hair growth and my hair seems much shinier.

title: Awesome
body: I love this product and am going to buy more. After giving birth and my hair falling out - I started to use this shampoo. I saw progress quickly. It's not going to grow thick in a day, but you'll see a huge difference really fast. I would recommend this to others (make sure to talk to your doctor, first - if you are breast feeding) I didn't start until after I stopped breast feeding.

title: Great in the beginning
body: I received Hers Minoxidil Solution with the Thickening Shampoo and Conditioner. On the first few weeks of using all three items, I noticed a great decrease in hair loss. After about three weeks of using, my hair loss went back to how it was before using the products.

title: Good
body: Have to use it twice a day and it takes awhile to see a change, but after two months I see a lot of new growth. I am very happy with this product. I feel so much better about my hair now.

title: Excellent Product
body: First time trying this product out and I must say it amazed me , I applied it to my front hairline as I noticed it wasn't full of hair in those spots and I noticed a difference once I started applying this product , it definitely looks more fuller in those areas where I applied it to , overall great product and happy I was able to test it out .

title: Hers Minoxidil
body: This product is easy to use with very clear instructions. I would recommend trying this product for any woman suffering from hair loss!

title: Shows promise
body: As a teen my hair was super thick and I never thought I'd have an issue with hair loss. But after two bouts of chemotherapy for two different cancers plus two pregnancies and a definite inherited thing my hair is very thin, sparse and grows so slow. I was so happy I was included in the BzzAgent trial for this Hers Topical Hair Growth solution. I regret not taking photos for a before/after but after using the topical solution I can see signs of my part filling in for sure. After four weeks? I'm not convinced this is enough time to see a huge difference, but I will stick with the topical treatment for awhile, along with a collagen & biotin supplement, I'm hopeful in more dramatic results after a couple months.

title: Hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth Solution
body: My hair has started thinning around my hairline. I am not sure if it is stress, aging or genetics. I would not add it to dry hair as it can make your hair appear greasy. I am starting to see very little hair growth (very fine) coming in. I have yet to purchase a second bottle, so I am not sure if the hair will continue to grow in, if I do not use a second and or third bottle. I did see a few posts of side effects, but I have not had any myself. I would need to purchase a second bottle to truly give more feedback or recommend this product.

title: Great for post pregnancy hair loss
body: This product did provide a bit more growth after losing hair post partum. However, it is a bit difficult to balance the application schedule with an infant.

title: Miracle grow for hair
body: Works wonders. I absolutely love it. Did wonders to my hair.

title: Great product!
body: I have noticed that I was losing my hair after suffering from covid. After I started using Topical Hair Growth Solution, I noticed a difference in the thickness of my hair.

title: Great product
body: I received the hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth Solution free to try in exchange for my honest opinion. I really liked the package. It was sophisticated and discreet. The product itself dispenses well from the container. It's too early to tell if the product is effective in regrowing hair. But I am hopeful.

title: Its working so far!
body: How does this product compare to other products you've tried? I have never tried anything like this. What are some benefits of owning this product? It helps regrow your hair depending on how you have hair loss. Would you buy this product? Yes and no. Yes because I have only used it for 1 month and I do notice a difference but no because I feel like it's drying out my hair and leaves a white ashy residue. Would you recommend this product to your friends or family? Yes

title: Too Soon To Be Sure, But So Far So Good!
body: I have only been trying this product for a couple of weeks. While I haven't yet seen any signs of regrowth, I would expect it would take longer consistent use to see this so I will keep using it. The application process wasn't the most convenient, from the child-proof lid to washing hands in cold water and especially needing to dispense on a cold surface. The foam was easy to apply to my scalp and didn't have any unpleasant odor. Upon application, I did feel a tingle but no burning or discomfort. I assume the tingle means it was working! All in all, I have no real complaints about this product, and have not used any other topical hair regrowth products to compare it to. I will continue using it and if I see any regrowth, I would happily purchase this product and recommend to my friends and family!

title: doesn't really do anything

title: Hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth
body: This solution made my head itch. It had a funny smell. I didn't notice any difference in my hair after using it.

title: Easy to use.
body: I haven't used this long enough to see any new growth but I understand that this is a product that you have to use consistently and it doesn't happen overnight. If you follow the directions on the packaging it's very simple to use and I haven't had any irritation at all. What I have noticed is that my hair seems to be shedding less than usual. I have high hopes for this product and will continue to use and will repurchase in the future.

title: Hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth Solution

I notice less hair coming out when I wash and less hair in my brush!

title: Great product
body: First of all, this is an easy to apply product. Non oily or smelly and you can use as part as your beauty routine. I could see on my scalp a fuzzy peachy hair coming after few weeks of use.

title: hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth Solution
body: I've only been using this for a couple weeks. It is easy to use and no mess. Dry fast and no smell. Comparing with others solutions that I tried before, The serum is not oily or heavy, It's been a few weeks and I am seeing some shorter hairs coming in. So, yes! title: Didn't really work for me
body: I can't say that the Hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth Solution didn't work - it did make my 'already' there hair follicles feel and look fuller. However, I cannot say that it helped grow new hair follicles. My hair does look fuller around my existing thinning hair, but I haven't grown any new hair. Also, my hair id dyed, and the color faded very fast once I began using the solution.

title: Already seeing results!!
body: I've been using Hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth Solution for a little over a month now & I'm already seeing results. Appearance is very important to Me & your hair is a major part of presenting yourself as put together, showing you made an effort & take PRIDE in yourself!! When my hair started to thin, during this stage in my life, I began to feel less sexy, so I searched for products to help with my plight. The fact that I'm getting tiny lil baby hairs coming through all over the top of my head and front hair line is exhilarating!! The only negative I've experienced is that my hair is colored & it's stripped that away, so I guess I'm going with my natural hair color while using this product. I previously used Rogaine for Woman, for several months, which had an off putting odor & didn't give Me any new growth, so comparing Hers to Rogaine, I'm definitely sticking with Hers!! I know every woman is different & individual results will vary, but in my opinion, Hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth Solution is the way to go!!!

title: Hers

Second, this only works for as long as you use it (i.e., plan on buying this forever, or else your hair will just fall out again). Third, only 18% of users saw a difference in 8 months, per the bottle. It typically takes 4 months to see any improvement. Honestly, I'd rather just use mousse and a good hair dryer. Don't waste your money.

title: Hers Hair Regrowth Treatment
body: This product is awesome in that it reactivates your hair follicles to stimulate your hair to regrow. As we get older, our hair thins and we begin to develop hair loss. title: Easy To Apply

title: Growth
body: Perfect for hair that's excessively shedding, this oil-eliminating shampoo from Hers works to stop your hair follicles from shrinking by washing away excess oil and buildup.  At first glance, I love the super minimal design of the bottle. It looks nice in my shower, and it doesn't scream "hair loss" at anyone. It also happens to smell quite nice, like a light botanical scent. When first shampooing, my hair immediately felt like it had a little more body to it and overall it felt clean. The conditioner has a blend of amino acids that will help damaged hair and boost strength and shine. It has a really creamy formula that I really love. It's filled with amazing ingredients for your hair like argan oil, coconut oil, and sunflower seed oil. After rinsing, my hair felt really smooth and it was super easy to comb. I really think my hair looks shinier and thicker. I am loving the easy this smells and I really enjoy that the pleasant smell continues throughout my day. The hair regrowth solution contains the active ingredient minoxidil 2%, along with alcohol, propylene glycol, and purified water. It's used to help with the main issues connected to women's hair loss and "promotes hair growth by shedding old hairs and replacing them with new ones." It does have a semi-harsh chemical scent but as my hair dried, I didn't notice the smell at all. Overall Hers really seems to be helping my hair. I have only been using this for approx. 30 days so I do not think I can expect full results in just one month, but I definitely see promise in hers' treatment. I think the hers Complete Hair Kit is a product that really can help regrow hair. If you have thinning hair I would for sure recommend giving this a try. #hers #hersshampoo #hersconditioner #hersregrowth # aging #thinning # #hairkit #argonoil #creamy #shiny #hairloss #over40 #momsofinstagram #reviewer # haircare #nomoreshedding #bzzagent

title: Impressed!

My experience with this product was like nothing I could compare too. Change my life this product is the best hair growth product I've ever used in my life other similar products didn't work for me my scalp never showed results of new hair growth like hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth Solution - 2oz! Met expectations this product is a blessing too my life. I highly recommended you try if you're experiencing hair loss or thinning. The directions also don't say when or how far apart the two applications per day should be applied so that was confusing. I didn't see any side effects but I also didn't see visible regrowth. I did notice some decrease of shedding, which is great. Wish the instructions were clearer and that it wasn't so runny and filmy.

If anything, there might be a slight improvement in the amount and frequency of hairs that fall out. However, it's not enough of an improvement that would cause me to recommend the product based on that alone. Overall, I just haven't seen the results I was hoping for. Though, after some research I found that this type of treatment can take up to 6 months to really experience results. Because of that, I am going to continue to use this product in hopes of achieving it's full potential later down the line.

body: This is the first time I have tried this brand and I must say I liked it very much. I am really impressed with its results after using this hair growth solution for more than a month, Initially, I was not sure if this will work for me but after continuous use, I have seen a great improvement in my hair texture, volume and, strength. How to use: The application is smooth and easy, It comes with an easy-to-use dropper & only 1 full dropper is enough for me. I use it twice a day, once in the morning and at night before going to bed. Overall opinion This is incredible, I am very impressed with its results & my hair look healthier and stronger than before. I am surprised that this has actually worked. I had thin hair on the crown but after continuous use, I have really seen a remarkable improvement in my hair. My hair fall has also reduced and the best part is I have seen new baby hair coming out of the follicle which makes me really happy and prompts me to buy more. My bottle is about to be finished and after seeing its astonishing results I will definitely purchase this again. I would highly recommend it because of the benefits that I have seen so far and whoever has similar issues should try this to see the amazing results.

title: Wild hair growth!
body: This solution really promotes serious hair growth.. I mean the fuzz regrowth factor is big after 2 days of use. Apply as directed and just watch! Cool product from an awesome company! :)

title: Hers system
body: I've been using the shampoo, conditioner and minoxidil. My hair feel really nice and definitely made it look and feel thick. I've only been using it for a month and i've seen a big difference in my hair. The shampoo and condition smell great. The minoxidil did make my hair a little greasy.

title: Not for me
body: It didn't do much for me but force me to wash my hair every day. I just didn't notice a difference, personally.

title: Interesting
body: This product doesn't really have a scent (which is nice), but was a bit intimidating to unbox and use. Really though, it's simple enough - but I would often forget to use it twice a day (as it recommends). I was a bit worried when it mentioned possible changes to hair color, but so far I seem to be fine. I don't know how enthused I am about this product, but I do think I will form more of an opinion over time and continued use.

title: Hmm not sure
body: I love the concept but it's not somthing I would use. I would be more likely to use a thickening spray

title: It's ok
body: I used this as directed and didn't see much of a result. Given it does say it may take months for result. When I put it on my areas it does drip down a bit. I combed it through with a fine tooth comb and it does get a bit crunchy when it drys. Not a big fan .

title: hers Minoxidil
body: I think I needed more time to see results so it's hard to truly give a well-rounded review. My hair grows slowly on its own so that could be why I didn't see any results. Additionally, there is a very potent smell. This is on-par with other monoxidil products.

title: Minoxidil
body: I found it worked good in thickening my hair, but I don't believe it worked at all in growing my hair. I have spots that are balding, but no change was seen.

title: Unsure
body: I haven't seen any results since I started using this product a few weeks ago.

title: Works
body: It works. After 1 month of use I notice my postpartum hair loss is growing again! I gave it 4 stars vs 5 cause it left my hair more oily than I would like!

title: Hair Growth Solution That May Help
body: I got the chance to try this product and had huge hopes of my hair growing by the inches after using it. However, I haven't seen much difference in my hair growth at all.

title: Good product
body: My mom is using this product and so far it's great and smells nice.

title: It's a miracle
body: I was cautious about seeking help with hair growth- i am pleasantly surprised. It's not greasy at all. This has significant helped my hairs shedding and my hair feels so much thicker

title: Science works
body: I believe there should be no shame in using a topical treatment like this to stimulate hair regrowth. I did some research on the active ingredient in this product and it is proven to work with consistent use. But not for about 40 days of consistent use. That's the only catch you need to be a patient consistent habitual user to truly see results. I have not been using that long but do have hope. Be advised that you might see your existing hair shedding. I read that this is because: "The minoxidil stimulates the resting hairs to cycle into the growing phase. This shedding resolves as the newer, healthier hairs grow in." Simple beautiful packaging. Admiral branding.

title: Not recommended due to side effects
body: I really liked the product. Followed the instructions. It was working...even continued buying. Then, I noticed facial hair (NEVER had it before) and other side effects. I stopped using it. Now, waiting for my facial hair to disappear. Afraid of shaving....

title: Thick hair
body: This product is good, but heavy feel of medicine. Maybe hiding the scent might help.

title: Amazing results
body: It has only been a couple of weeks since I started using the hers Minoxidil Topical Hair Growth Solution but I am already seeing results. My hair immediately seemed thicker. and I am seeing the area that was thinning start to fill out. I have a bit of trouble keeping the solution where I want it - I wish they could make it thicker but as far as performance - I'm very happy with the product.

title: Great solution for women hair loss
body: I noticed thinning hair up from and I was embarrassed. I was glad to find this product. It was in safely sealed wrapping. The pacing looks up scale and nice. It's also obscure enough that you're comfortable having it on the counter in the bathroom. I like this product quite a lot. Super excited to continue using it!

title: See some improvement.
body: I like that this is easy to use but using on dry hair it did make my roots look a little greasy. I have seen some improvement in smaller areas but haven't been using long enough to notice a huge difference.

title: Enthusiastically waiting
body: I was skeptical about this product, because the ones I have used in the past have not yielded any results. The product says results within 3-6 month, but I am beginning to see some growth after a month of usage.

title: Solution for growth
body: I really like this so far I've only used it three times but it is not sticky or make my head hurt it doesn't smell horrible either it makes my hair feel thick too which is awesome

title: Working for me so far
body: I’ve been using this daily (am & pm) for a number of months now with some positive measurable results. Get it. Try it and hey if you don’t see anything after a month or two move on.

title: Thickening solution
body: Now that I am getting older, my genes are starting to catch up with me and my hair is starting to thin out. This solution is specifically for women and I am not seeing a major difference in my hair. I don't see much hair growth happening, the strands do seem slightly thicker.

My hair is thinning due to possible genetics and stress, but I was balking at paying $40  for more well-known hair regrowth brands. I’ve been using this for two months, and am beginning to see some results. I use it when my hair is wet and dry, and have not seen the greasiness other commenters have. Your hair appears wet during the time it takes to dry, so keep that in mind if you’re having to go out the door after application. Other than that, it’s easy to apply and seems to be working.

I was really skeptical... I’m on my second bottle and I already see a huge difference. It can be genetics, stress, getting older (2020, in general)... whatever it is, being a woman with thinning hair can be really hard to take. I don’t think it hurts to try this product out. Your hair does shed quite a bit at first, but just keep using it, the hair that grows in is way more exciting and fills everything in. I find applying it after a shower, when your hair is wet, and then styling your hair works best. I was worried I wouldn’t be able to keep using it because it makes your hair look dirty and greasy if you just add it to your already dry, styled hair. Good luck and I hope it works for you, I definitely see a difference and as much as I love my grandma I do not want her lack of hair.

title: Hair growth product
body: This product work. It says 3-6 months. I notice some growth immediately. Great choice of product!

title: great product that really works
body: I liked that it didn't make me hair greasy like the other ones. it actually works. I tried another kind after this and it just made my hair fall out again. I will be going back to the HERS and HIS brand.
